name: Horizontal Layout (Side by Side)
summary: HorizontalLayout to render fields side by side in a row
whenToUse: Placing related short fields on the same row (e.g., first name + last name)
When horizontal space is available and fields are logically grouped
notes: HorizontalLayout places elements side by side in a single row
Each element gets equal width by default
On narrow screens, elements may stack vertically depending on the renderer
Best for 2-3 related short fields; avoid more than 3 to prevent crowding
